Bash(xxd "设计文档/自主决策循环设计.md")
Bash(node -e "const { createCanvas, loadImage } = require\('@napi-rs/canvas'\); console.log\('canvas OK'\)")

Bash(node -e "const pv = require\('prismarine-viewer'\); console.log\('three version:', require\('three/package.json'\).version\); console.log\('viewer version:', require\('prismarine-viewer/package.json'\).version\);")

Bash(node -e "try { const m = require\('minecraft-data'\); const d = m\('1.21.11'\); console.log\('mcData 1.21.11: OK, blocks:', Object.keys\(d.blocks\).length\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('mcData 1.21.11 FAILED:', e.message\); }")

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('blocksStates/1.21.11.json'\)\); print\('Entries:', len\(d\)\); print\('Keys sample:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)[:5]\); print\('missing_texture exists:', 'missing_texture' in d\); print\('stone sample:', json.dumps\(d.get\('stone', {}\), indent=2\)[:200]\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./blocksStates/1.21.11.json'\); console.log\('Entries:', Object.keys\(d\).length\); console.log\('Sample keys:', Object.keys\(d\).slice\(0,5\)\); console.log\('missing_texture:', !!d.missing_texture\); console.log\('stone:', JSON.stringify\(d.stone\).substring\(0,200\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const mf = require\('mineflayer'\); console.log\('mineflayer version:', require\('mineflayer/package.json'\).version\); console.log\('supported versions:', mf.supportedVersions ? mf.supportedVersions.slice\(0,10\) : 'N/A'\);")
Bash(ls -la "e:\\深度学习项目\\Minecraft智能体项目\\..\\..\\previewer改版")

Bash(node -e "const j = require\('./viewer/public/blockStates/1.21.8.json'\); console.log\('Has __tints:', !!j.__tints\); if \(j.__tints\) console.log\('Tint keys:', Object.keys\(j.__tints\)\); console.log\('Block count:', Object.keys\(j\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const pc = require\('prismarine-chunk'\); console.log\('prismarine-chunk version:', pc.version || 'unknown'\); const col = new pc\('1.21.11'\); console.log\('Column type:', typeof col\); console.log\('toJson type:', typeof col.toJson\(\)\); const json = JSON.parse\(col.toJson\(\)\); console.log\('toJson keys:', Object.keys\(json\).slice\(0, 10\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const pc = require\('prismarine-chunk'\); console.log\('type:', typeof pc\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(pc\)\); const registry = pc\('1.21.11'\); console.log\('registry type:', typeof registry\); console.log\('registry keys:', Object.keys\(registry\).slice\(0, 20\)\);")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\('minecraft-data'\)\('1.20.1'\); const stone = m.blocksStates['stone']; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(stone, null, 2\).substring\(0, 1000\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const m = require\('minecraft-data'\)\('1.20.1'\); const d = m.blocksStates['stone']; console.log\('type:', typeof d\); console.log\('keys:', d ? Object.keys\(d\).join\(', '\) : 'null'\)")
Bash(node -e "const m = require\('minecraft-data'\)\('1.16.2'\); const d = m.blocksStates['stone']; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(d\).substring\(0, 500\)\)")
